# pipefy_pipe_relation (Resource)

Connects a parent pipe to a child pipe. Both `parent_id` and `child_id` must be pipes; changing either forces a new relation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pipefy_pipe" "orders" {
  name            = "Orders"
  organization_id = "<ORG_ID>"
}

resource "pipefy_pipe" "fulfillment" {
  name            = "Fulfillment"
  organization_id = "<ORG_ID>"
}

resource "pipefy_pipe_relation" "orders_to_fulfillment" {
  parent_id = pipefy_pipe.orders.id
  child_id  = pipefy_pipe.fulfillment.id
  name      = "Fulfillment tasks"

  can_create_new_items       = true
  can_connect_existing_items = false

  all_children_must_be_done_to_finish_parent = true

  auto_fill_field_enabled = true
  own_field_maps = [
    {
      field_id   = "<CHILD_START_FORM_FIELD_INTERNAL_ID>"
      input_mode = "fixed_value"
      value      = "High"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `child_id` (String) The ID of the child pipe
- `name` (String) Name of the relation
- `parent_id` (String) The ID of the parent pipe

### Optional

- `all_children_must_be_done_to_finish_parent` (Boolean) Whether all connected children must be done before the parent can be finished.
- `all_children_must_be_done_to_move_parent` (Boolean) Whether all connected children must be done before the parent can be moved.
- `auto_fill_field_enabled` (Boolean) Whether auto-fill of child start-form fields from the parent is enabled. Pair with `own_field_maps`.
- `can_connect_existing_items` (Boolean) Whether existing items can be connected through the relation.
- `can_connect_multiple_items` (Boolean) Whether multiple items can be connected through the relation.
- `can_create_new_items` (Boolean) Whether new connected items can be created through the relation.
- `child_must_exist_to_finish_parent` (Boolean) Whether at least one connected child must exist before the parent can be finished.
- `child_must_exist_to_move_parent` (Boolean) Whether at least one connected child must exist before the parent can be moved.
- `own_field_maps` (Attributes Set) Field mappings that auto-fill a child item's start-form fields from the parent item. Omit to leave unmanaged; removing it stops managing the maps but does not reset them on the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--own_field_maps))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the pipe relation

<a id="nestedatt--own_field_maps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `own_field_maps`

Required:

- `field_id` (String) The child start-form field to fill, given as the field's internal_id.
- `input_mode` (String) How the value is supplied, for example `fixed_value`. Supported values are defined by Pipefy; see the API reference (https://developers.pipefy.com/reference).
- `value` (String) The value or source-field reference for the mapping.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import an existing pipe relation using the format parent_pipe_id/relation_id.
# The first component must be the parent pipe id: the relation is read from that
# pipe's childrenRelations, so a child pipe id will not resolve.
terraform import pipefy_pipe_relation.orders_to_fulfillment "<PARENT_PIPE_ID>/<RELATION_ID>"
```
